specific_question: How long are the auto warranties that Elexion Automotive offers as part of its after sales product suite as of August 1, 2025?
answer: As of August 1, 2025, Elexion Automotive offers a 10-year warranty standard with all purchases.
dr_question: With the reported slowdown in the sales of electric vehicles (EV), how can after sales products and customer service strategies help our company remain successful in 2026?
